name: Vessel Rover Case
summary: The Vessel Rover Case is a sleek, travel-ready storage solution designed to keep Vessel batteries and cartridges neatly organised and protected.
description: The Vessel Rover Case is a sleek, travel-ready storage solution designed to keep Vessel batteries and cartridges neatly organised and protected. Built with a moulded EVA core and wrapped in premium soft-touch matte faux leather, the Rover Case offers durability, discretion, and everyday portability for your customers. The Rover Case is engineered to fit a wide range of Vessel 510-thread devices, including the Craftsman, Expedition, and Vista Edge series. It securely stores two batteries and two cartridges while providing space for small accessories. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Moulded EVA core with soft-touch matte faux leather wrap
